pattern: ATH-proximity whipsaw: entering near a 52-week high concentrates stop-triggering risk in a thin zone where price oscillates while discovering new equilibrium — the same setup geometry will recur and produce premature stopouts unless stop width is calibrated to ATH-vicinity volatility.

Breakout-without-consolidation: entering immediately on a 55-day breakout without waiting for a brief pullback-and-hold above the breakout level, increasing susceptibility to failed breakouts that stop out before the structural support (200-DMA) is even tested.
